name: DeepZero
desc: Find zero-days while you sleep. DeepZero is an automated vulnerability research framework that parses, decompiles, and analyzes thousands of Windows kernel dri…
descFull: Find zero-days while you sleep. DeepZero is an automated vulnerability research framework that parses, decompiles, and analyzes thousands of Windows kernel drivers for exploitable IOCTLs natively using AI agents.
